title: deer-flow.forge.session.transitioned v1
description: A Forge session changed station (forward-only per Forge spec §5). Producer: backend/packages/harness/deerflow/bus.py::emit_forge_session_transitioned. Subject is session_id. Stations form a DAG: anvil → crucible → quench → temper → ship.

bead_id.description: beads id this session was opened for

patron.description: human or agent who triggered the transition
